headline: Tractor Supply and Home Depot Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after April PPI hit 6% annually, the highest in over three years, confirming that wholesale cost pressures were accelerating just as consumer real wages turned negative for the first time since 2023.
